title: enallagma macrophylla
side_effects: Enallagma macrophylla can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Some examples of side effects include nausea, dizziness, and difficulty breathing. In severe cases, improper use of Enallagma macrophylla can also lead to kidney damage, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant to avoid these potential side effects.
